description_long: This object is a compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a short barrel and a wooden grip. The barrels are parallel and made of dark metal, with a smooth, matte finish and no visible ribbing or venting. The grip is curved and appears to be made of polished wood, providing a comfortable hold. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a single trigger, with a simple, functional design. The shotgun lacks a full stock, instead featuring a pistol grip for easier maneuverability in close quarters. Its overall appearance suggests a utilitarian design, suitable for urban environments where compactness and ease of handling are important.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a short barrel and a wooden pistol grip, featuring a rounded trigger guard and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the double barrels, wooden grip, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the two parallel barrels and the dark metal finish, emphasizing the shotgun's double-barrel configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the wooden grip and the overall compactness of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden grip and the back of the barrels, with the trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, simple with no finger grooves or reinforcement
